question: Do the current registered G1 semantics entail pairwise unique FAR recovery up to the registered commitment-equivalence relation?
answer: No under the current G1 semantics
relation_to_G2_G3: G2 and G3 remain valid and do not add symmetry, transitivity, or pairwise uniqueness to the G1 commitment-equivalence relation.

requires_new_constraints_to_reopen: prove commitmentEquivalent is an equivalence relation
define recovery equality or quotient equality extensionally
prove all faithful candidates lie in one equivalence class
then re-run quotient minimality and representation invariance

supersedes.reason: The previous Boolean proxy did not instantiate substantive FAR definitions. This version replaces it with an actual FrozenUPPSemantics model.
